'''鈭歡-l-ng''' ('''kagalang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:youthenize|youthenize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-l-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:youthenize|youthenize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-l-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kagalang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigalang|thigalang]] || [[word:jigalang|jigalang]] || [[word:shigalang|shigalang]] || [[word:kigalang|kigalang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugalang|thuthugalang]] || [[word:jujugalang|jujugalang]] || [[word:shushugalang|shushugalang]] || [[word:kukugalang|kukugalang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugalang|thugalang]] || [[word:jugalang|jugalang]] || [[word:shugalang|shugalang]] || [[word:kugalang|kugalang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugalang|thugalang]] || [[word:jugalang|jugalang]] || [[word:shugalang|shugalang]] || [[word:kugalang|kugalang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegalang|thegalang]] || [[word:jegalang|jegalang]] || [[word:shegalang|shegalang]] || [[word:kegalang|kegalang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogalang|thothogalang]] || [[word:jojogalang|jojogalang]] || [[word:shoshogalang|shoshogalang]] || [[word:kokogalang|kokogalang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogalang|thogalang]] || [[word:jogalang|jogalang]] || [[word:shogalang|shogalang]] || [[word:kogalang|kogalang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogalang|thogalang]] || [[word:jogalang|jogalang]] || [[word:shogalang|shogalang]] || [[word:kogalang|kogalang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:galang|galang]] || [[word:galang|galang]] || [[word:galang|galang]] || [[word:galang|galang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:galang|galang]] || [[word:galang|galang]] || [[word:galang|galang]] || [[word:galang|galang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:galang|galang]] || [[word:galang|galang]] || [[word:galang|galang]] || [[word:galang|galang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:galang|galang]] || [[word:galang|galang]] || [[word:galang|galang]] || [[word:galang|galang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙galang|th忙galang]] || [[word:j忙galang|j忙galang]] || [[word:sh忙galang|sh忙galang]] || [[word:k忙galang|k忙galang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagalang|thathagalang]] || [[word:jajagalang|jajagalang]] || [[word:shashagalang|shashagalang]] || [[word:kakagalang|kakagalang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagalang|thagalang]] || [[word:jagalang|jagalang]] || [[word:shagalang|shagalang]] || [[word:kagalang|kagalang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagalang|thagalang]] || [[word:jagalang|jagalang]] || [[word:shagalang|shagalang]] || [[word:kagalang|kagalang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagalang|shagalang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagalang|goshagalang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagalang|gokishagalang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagalangn眉|shagalangn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagalangnkn眉|goshagalangnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagalangn眉|gokishagalangn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagalangsh毛|shagalangsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagalangnksh毛|goshagalangnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagalangsh毛|gokishagalangsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagalangro|shagalangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagalangnkro|goshagalangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagalangro|gokishagalangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagalangmu|shagalangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagalangnkmu|goshagalangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagalangmu|gokishagalangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagalangsher|shagalangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagalangnksher|goshagalangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagalangsher|gokishagalangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagalangng|shagalangng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagalangnkng|goshagalangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagalangng|gokishagalangng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagalangya|shagalangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagalangnkya|goshagalangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagalangya|gokishagalangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagalangyam|shagalangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagalangnkyam|goshagalangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagalangyam|gokishagalangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagalangn眉sh毛|shagalangn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagalangnkn眉sh毛|goshagalangnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagalangn眉sh毛|gokishagalangn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagalangn眉ro|shagalangn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagalangnkn眉ro|goshagalangnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagalangn眉ro|gokishagalangn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagalangn眉mu|shagalangn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagalangnkn眉mu|goshagalangnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagalangn眉mu|gokishagalangn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagalangsh毛n眉|shagalangsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagalangnksh毛n眉|goshagalangnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagalangsh毛n眉|gokishagalangsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagalangsh毛ro|shagalangsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagalangnksh毛ro|goshagalangnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagalangsh毛ro|gokishagalangsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagalangsh毛mu|shagalangsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagalangnksh毛mu|goshagalangnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagalangsh毛mu|gokishagalangsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagalangron眉|shagalangron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagalangnkron眉|goshagalangnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagalangron眉|gokishagalangron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagalangrosh毛|shagalangrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagalangnkrosh毛|goshagalangnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagalangrosh毛|gokishagalangrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagalangromu|shagalangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagalangnkromu|goshagalangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagalangromu|gokishagalangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagalangmun眉|shagalangmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagalangnkmun眉|goshagalangnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagalangmun眉|gokishagalangmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagalangmush毛|shagalangmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagalangnkmush毛|goshagalangnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagalangmush毛|gokishagalangmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagalangmuro|shagalangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagalangnkmuro|goshagalangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagalangmuro|gokishagalangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|d414c41}}
